name: Marilyn Bergman
abstract: Alan Bergman (September 11, 1925 – July 17, 2025) and Marilyn Keith Bergman (née Katz; November 10, 1928 – January 8, 2022) were an American songwriting duo. Married from 1958 until Marilyn's death, together they wrote music and lyrics for numerous celebrated television, film, and stage productions.

concerts.label: Carnegie Hall Celebrates The Music of Frank Sinatra
Standard Time with Michael Feinstein: The Way They Are: Celebrating the Lyrics of Alan and Marilyn Bergman
